mapper.select:
select a.resource_id, a.resource_name, a.resource_code, a.resource_desc, a.owner_type, a.avatar, a.create_by, b.agent_type, b.agent_home_url, b.prologue, b.integration_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.create_type, b.terminal, b.open_super_helper, b.tag_name, c.is_top, c.top_time, case when COALESCE(k.force_use_count, 0) > 0 then 'FORCE_USE' when COALESCE(k.available_use_count, 0) > 0 then 'AVAILABLE_USE' when COALESCE(k.allow_manage_count, 0) > 0 then 'ALLOW_MANAGE' else null end as grantType, k.latest_grant_time from ss_resource a left join ss_res_ext_dig_employee b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id
left join ( select suas.is_top, suas.top_time, suas.agent_id from suas_superassist_sub_agent suas join po_users pu on suas.superassist_id = pu.assistant_id where suas.status_cd = '00A' and pu.user_id = #{userId} ) c on a.resource_id = c.agent_id
left join ( select mem_obj_id, count(1) as total from byai_session_member where mem_obj_type = 'AGENT' and creator_id = #{userId} and create_time >= #{recentlyStartDate} group by mem_obj_id ) d on a.resource_id = d.mem_obj_id
left join ( select grant_obj_id, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as red_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'BLACK' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as black_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' and grant_type = 'FORCE_USE' then 1 else 0 end) as force_use_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' and grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' then 1 else 0 end) as available_use_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' and grant_type = 'ALLOW_MANAGE' then 1 else 0 end) as allow_manage_count, max(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then create_date else null end) as latest_grant_time from au_privilege_grant where grant_type in ('AVAILABLE_USE', 'FORCE_USE', 'ALLOW_MANAGE') and grant_obj_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and status_cd = 'A'
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{orgId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userId})
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'POST' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{positionId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'STATION' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userStationId})
group by grant_obj_id ) k on a.resource_id = k.grant_obj_id
and a.resource_biz_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and a.resource_status = 2
and (k.black_count = 0 or k.black_count is null)
and a.create_by = #{userId}
and k.red_count > 0
and (k.red_count > 0 or a.create_by = #{userId})
and a.resource_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and b.terminal in
#{terminal}
and b.machine_channel like concat('%', #{machineChannel}, '%')
order by COALESCE(c.is_top, 0) desc, COALESCE(c.top_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') desc, COALESCE(d.total, 0) desc, a.create_time desc, COALESCE(k.latest_grant_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') desc

select a.resource_id, a.resource_name, a.resource_code, a.resource_desc, a.owner_type, a.avatar, a.create_by, b.agent_type, b.agent_home_url, b.prologue, b.integration_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.create_type, b.terminal, b.open_super_helper, b.tag_name, case when COALESCE(k.available_use_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'AVAILABLE_USE' ELSE NULL END AS grantType, k.latest_grant_time from ss_resource a left join ss_res_ext_dig_employee b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id
left join ( select mem_obj_id, count(1) as total from byai_session_member where mem_obj_type = 'AGENT' and creator_id = #{userId} and create_time >= #{recentlyStartDate} group by mem_obj_id ) c on a.resource_id = c.mem_obj_id
left join ( select grant_obj_id, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as red_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'BLACK' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as black_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' and grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and grant_to_obj_type='USER' then 1 else 0 end) as available_use_count, max(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then create_date else null end) as latest_grant_time from au_privilege_grant where grant_type in ('AVAILABLE_USE', 'FORCE_USE') and grant_obj_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and status_cd = 'A'
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{orgId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userId})
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'POST' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{positionId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'STATION' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userStationId})
group by grant_obj_id ) k on a.resource_id = k.grant_obj_id
and a.resource_biz_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and a.resource_status = 2
and (k.red_count > 0 or a.create_by = #{userId})
and (k.black_count = 0 or k.black_count is null)
and a.resource_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and b.terminal in
#{terminal}
and COALESCE(c.total, 0) > 0
order by COALESCE(c.total, 0) desc

select a.resource_id, a.resource_name, a.resource_code, a.resource_desc, a.owner_type, a.avatar, a.create_by, b.agent_type, b.agent_home_url, b.prologue, b.integration_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.create_type, b.terminal, b.open_super_helper, b.tag_name, case when COALESCE(k.available_use_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'AVAILABLE_USE' ELSE NULL END AS grantType, k.latest_grant_time from ss_resource a left join ss_res_ext_dig_employee b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id
left join ( select grant_obj_id, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as red_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'BLACK' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as black_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' and grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and grant_to_obj_type='USER' then 1 else 0 end) as available_use_count, max(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then create_date else null end) as latest_grant_time from au_privilege_grant where grant_type in('AVAILABLE_USE','FORCE_USE') and grant_obj_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and status_cd = 'A'
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{orgId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userId})
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'POST' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{positionId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'STATION' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userStationId})
group by grant_obj_id ) k on a.resource_id = k.grant_obj_id
and a.resource_biz_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and a.resource_status = 2
and (k.red_count > 0 or a.create_by = #{userId})
and (k.black_count = 0 or k.black_count is null)
and a.resource_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and b.terminal in
#{terminal}
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC,COALESCE(k.latest_grant_time,'1970-01-01 00:00:00') DESC

select a.resource_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_code, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.owner_type, a.catalog_id, a.create_time, a.man_user_id, a.create_by, b.agent_type, b.agent_home_url, b.prologue, b.integration_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.create_type, b.terminal, b.open_super_helper, b.tag_name, b.skills, c.user_name as creator_name, COALESCE(d.total, 0) useCount, COALESCE(e.total, 0) focusCount, COALESCE(k.red_count, 0) as red_count, COALESCE(k.black_count, 0) as black_count, COALESCE(k.force_use_count, 0) as force_use_count, COALESCE(k.available_use_count, 0) as available_use_count, COALESCE(k.approve_status_count, 0) as approve_status_count from ss_resource a left join ss_res_ext_dig_employee b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id left join po_users c on a.create_by = c.user_id
left join ( select mem_obj_id, count(1) as total from byai_session_member where mem_obj_type = 'AGENT' group by mem_obj_id ) d on a.resource_id = d.mem_obj_id
left join ( select grant_obj_id, sum(1) as total from au_privilege_grant where grant_obj_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and status_cd = 'A' and grant_to_type = 'RED' and grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' group by grant_obj_id ) e on a.resource_id = e.grant_obj_id
left join ( select grant_obj_id, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as red_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'BLACK' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as black_count, sum(case when grant_type = 'FORCE_USE' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as force_use_count, sum(case when grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as available_use_count, sum(case when grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and status_cd = 'S' then 1 else 0 end) as approve_status_count, sum(case when grant_type = 'ALLOW_MANAGE' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as allow_manage_count, max(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then create_date else null end) as latest_grant_time from au_privilege_grant where grant_type in ('AVAILABLE_USE', 'FORCE_USE', 'ALLOW_MANAGE') and grant_obj_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and status_cd in ('A', 'S')
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{orgId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userId})
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'POST' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{positionId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'STATION' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userStationId})
group by grant_obj_id ) k on a.resource_id = k.grant_obj_id
left join ( select grant_obj_id, count(1) as pending_apply_count, sum(case when grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userId} then 1 else 0 end) as my_pending_apply_count from au_privilege_grant where grant_type = 'AVAILABLE_USE' and grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'P' group by grant_obj_id ) p on a.resource_id = p.grant_obj_id
and a.resource_biz_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE'
and a.resource_status = #{resourceStatus}
and a.resource_status = 2
and a.owner_type = #{ownerType}
and a.resource_id = #{resourceId}
and a.resource_id = #{resourceId}
and a.catalog_id in
#{catalogIdItem}
and a.catalog_id = #{catalogId}
and a.resource_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and (k.black_count = 0 or k.black_count is null)
and a.man_org_id in
#{orgId}
and COALESCE(k.force_use_count, 0) > 0 and COALESCE(k.approve_status_count, 0) <= 0
and COALESCE(k.available_use_count, 0) > 0 and COALESCE(k.approve_status_count, 0) <= 0
and COALESCE(k.approve_status_count, 0) > 0
and COALESCE(k.red_count, 0) <= 0 and COALESCE(k.approve_status_count, 0) <= 0
and a.create_by = #{userId}
and (a.create_by is null or a.create_by != #{userId}) and (k.red_count > 0 or k.allow_manage_count > 0)
and coalesce(p.pending_apply_count, 0) > 0 and ( a.create_by = #{userId} or k.allow_manage_count > 0
or 1 = 1
or exists ( select 1 from po_organization org where org.org_id = a.man_org_id and (
org.path_code = #{pathCode} or org.path_code like concat(#{pathCode}, '.%')
) )
)
and coalesce(p.my_pending_apply_count, 0) > 0
order by COALESCE(d.total, 0) asc
order by COALESCE(d.total, 0) desc
order by COALESCE(e.total, 0) asc
order by COALESCE(e.total, 0) desc
order by a.create_time asc
order by a.create_time desc
order by COALESCE(a.update_time, '9999-12-31 23:59:59') asc
order by COALESCE(a.update_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') desc
order by COALESCE(a.publish_time, '9999-12-31 23:59:59') asc
order by COALESCE(a.publish_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') desc
order by COALESCE(a.update_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') desc, a.create_time desc

select org_id from po_organization
and parent_org_id = -1

select a.resource_id, a.resource_name, a.resource_code, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, b.agent_type, b.agent_home_url, b.terminal, b.tag_name, c.session_id from ss_resource a, ss_res_ext_dig_employee b, byai_session_member c where a.resource_id = b.resource_id and a.resource_id = c.mem_obj_id and c.user_role = 'MEMBER' and c.session_id in
#{sessionId}

select a.resource_id, a.resource_source_pk_id, a.resource_code, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.resource_biz_type, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.update_time from ss_resource a left join ( select grant_obj_id, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as red_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'BLACK' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as black_count from au_privilege_grant where grant_type in ('AVAILABLE_USE', 'FORCE_USE') and grant_obj_type in ('AGENT', 'TOOLKIT', 'TOOL', 'MCP_TOOL', 'MCP') and status_cd = 'A'
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{orgId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userId})
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'POST' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{positionId}
)
or (grant_to_obj_type = 'STATION' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userStationId})
group by grant_obj_id ) k on a.resource_id = k.grant_obj_id
and a.resource_status = 2
and (k.black_count = 0 or k.black_count is null)
and a.resource_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and a.resource_biz_type in
#{bizType}
and a.resource_biz_type in ('AGENT', 'TOOLKIT', 'TOOL', 'MCP_TOOL', 'MCP')
order by a.create_time desc, a.update_time desc
